title: Kubambisana Nekungcubutana Emngceleni WaseKapa
subject: History
caps_topic: Cooperation and conflict on the frontiers of the Cape Colony in the early 19th century

meta.title: Kubambisana Nekungcubutana Emngceleni WaseKapa
meta.subject: History
meta.caps_topic: Cooperation and conflict on the frontiers of the Cape Colony in the early 19th century

sources.title: Grade 7 - Term 4: Co-operation and conflict on the frontiers of the Cape Colony in the early 19th century
Contact, conflict and dispossession on the Cape Eastern (or Northern) frontiers in the nineteenth century
Early struggles: contact and conflict at the Cape Colony
The establishment of the Cape and its impact on the Khoikhoi and Dutch
The role of missionaries in the conquest
European missionaries in southern Africa: the role of missionaries
Fifth Frontier War: the sangoma Makana attacks Grahamstown
Xhosa King Hintsa ka Phalo killed by British troops

slides.title: Kubambisana Nekungcubutana Emngceleni WaseKapa
slides.lead: Indlela imiphakatsi yemaXhosa, ema-trekboer (balimi betinkhomo lebebangemaBhunu), emaNgisi kanye nebafundisi bevangeli lebebahlangana ngayo, bahwebelane babuye baxabane emngceleni waseMpumalanga Kapa (Eastern Cape) ekucaleni kwabo-1800.

media.alt: Umfula loluhlata ugudla emkhatsini wetindzawo letimbili, lenye inetinkhomo lenye inenqola, tihlangana emngceleni.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='320' height='62' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M0 118 L60 96 L120 112 L180 90 L250 110 L320 92 L320 118 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M150 40 q10 40 -6 70 q-14 26 4 70' fill='none' stroke='#4a6d8c' stroke-width='7' stroke-linecap='round'/><circle cx='250' cy='44' r='22' fill='#e8a13a'/><ellipse cx='60' cy='138' rx='12' ry='7' fill='#5c3a22'/><rect x='214' y='128' width='34' height='14' fill='#7a5a3a'/><circle cx='220' cy='146' r='5' fill='#3a2a1a'/><circle cx='242' cy='146' r='5' fill='#3a2a1a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Beka simo: 'umngcele' (frontier) akusiyo nje kuphela lomudvwa emephini kodvwa yindzawo lebanti lapho khona bantfu labehlukene bahlala badvutane, ngalesinye sikhatsi basitana ngalesinye sikhatsi balwa. Chaza kutsi lesifundvo sibuka umngcele waseMpumalanga Kapa (Eastern Cape) ekucaleni kwabo-1800, cishe eceleni koMfula lomkhulu iGreat Fish River. Buta bafundzi kutsi bacabanga kutsi kwentekani nangabe emacembu lamabili afuna lomhlaba nemanti lafanako.

slides.title: Umngcele waseMpumalanga Kapa
slides.lead: Ngabo-1800 iCape Colony beyisandzalele ibhekise nasemphumalanga kwaze kwatsi balimi bemaDashi (Dutch) bahlangana nemiphakatsi yemaXhosa eceleni koMfula lomkhulu iGreat Fish River.

blocks.text: I-**Cape Colony** yacala njengendzawo yemaDashi (Dutch) eTheku laseTable Bay ngo-1652. Kwatsi ngemvakwemiyaka lengaphezu kwe-150, balimi betinkhomo lebekutsiwa **ma-trekboer** bachubeka baya ngasemphumalanga bafuna emadlelo. Ngo-1795, futsi nango-1806, i**Britain** yatsatsa umbuso weKapa.

items: Indzawo yemngcele beyisemhlabeni waseMpumalanga Kapa (Eastern Cape) lwanamuhla, eceleni koMfula lomkhulu iGreat Fish River.
Bekungesiwo umngcele lomile - bewushintja njengoba bantfu bahamba netimphi tilwa.
Emacembu lehlukene abelana, ancintisana futsi alwela lomhlaba nemanti lafanako.

media.alt: Imephu lelula lekhombisa iCape Colony ngasenshonalanga nemhlaba wemaXhosa ngasemphumalanga, kwehlukaniswa nguMfula iGreat Fish River.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='10' y='20' width='104' height='120' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='126' y='20' width='104' height='120' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M120 18 q-8 40 4 62 q10 22 -4 62' fill='none' stroke='#4a6d8c' stroke-width='6'/><text x='30' y='84' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#3a2a1a'>Cape</text><text x='24' y='98' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#3a2a1a'>Colony</text><text x='150' y='84' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#243318'>Xhosa</text><text x='152' y='98' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#243318'>land</text></svg>

slides.notes: Tfola indzawo yemngcele endaweni nasesikhatsini kubafundzi. Khomba emephini iMpumalanga Kapa (Eastern Cape) nemfula iGreat Fish River. Gcizelela kutsi umngcele bewuchubeka uya ngasemphumalanga njengoba ikoloni ikhula. Caphela lushintjo lekusuka ekubuseni kwemaDashi (Dutch) kuya kwemaNgisi (British), lokwaba nemtselela ngoba iBritain yaletsa bahlali labasha netinchubomgomo letinsha emngceleni.

slides.title: Ngubani bebahlala emngceleni?
slides.lead: Emacembu lambalwa abelana ngendzawo yemngcele, ngulinye linendlela yalo yekuphila.

blocks.heading: Imiphakatsi yemaXhosa
blocks.text: Balimi labafuya tinkhomo labebahlala etigodlweni (chiefdoms) ngasemphumalanga koMfula iFish River, baholwa tikhulu letinjenga-Ngqika na-Ndlambe.

blocks.heading: Ema-trekboer
blocks.text: Balimi betinkhomo labebakhuluma siDashi (Dutch) labesuka eKapa baya ngasemphumalanga bafuna emadlelo lamasha.

blocks.heading: EmaKhoikhoi nemaSan
blocks.text: Bafuyi nebatingeli bekucala balesigodzi, labanyenti sebasebenta emapulazini emakoloni nobe bahlala emkhatsini wemaXhosa.

blocks.heading: EmaNgisi nebafundisi bevangeli
blocks.text: Titfunywa temaNgisi (British), emasotja neBahlali bango-1820 (1820 Settlers), kanye nebafundisi bevangeli labeta kufundzisa nekuphendvula bantfu enkholweni.

slides.notes: Nika bafundzi luhla lwebantfu ngaphambi kwekutsi indzaba ivuleke. Gcizelela kutsi emaXhosa bekungabalimi labenehlelo lelicinile lemphakatsi netembusave, hhayi nje bantfu 'labebavimba' bahlali. Cwaninga kutsi emaKhoikhoi nemaSan bekukadze bakhona ngaphambi kwawo omabili lamacembu. Gwema kubukisa noma yiliphi licembu njengalelihle konkhe nobe lelibi konkhe.

slides.title: Kuhwebelana nekuhlalisana
slides.lead: Isikhatsi lesinyenti, bantfu bemngcele bebabambisana ngoba babedzingana.

blocks.text: Kuphila emngceleni bekungesikho kuphela kwekulwa. Imiphakatsi yemaXhosa nemakoloni **babehwebelana**, bantjintjiselana ngetinkhomo, indlovu (ivory), ubuhlalu, ithusi (copper), indwangu netikhali tensimbi. Labanye bantfu bafundza tilimi tabanye, basebenta ndzawonye baze bendzelana emkhatsini wemacembu.

items: Tinkhomo betiwumcebo kubo bobabili emaXhosa nema-trekboer, ngako babehwebelana befuyele ndzawonye.
Bebasebenti bemaKhoikhoi, batingeli nebahwebi bebavamise kuhamba emkhatsini wemiphakatsi lemibili.
Bafundisi bevangeli, tikhulu netitfunywa ngalesinye sikhatsi babenta tivumelwane tekugcina kuthula.

media.alt: Tandla letimbili tishintjelana ngempahla ngetulu kwetinkhomo letimbili, tikhombisa kuhwebelana.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 60 q30 -20 60 0' fill='none' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='9' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M120 60 q30 -20 60 0' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='9' stroke-linecap='round'/><circle cx='110' cy='58' r='10' fill='#e8a13a'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='118' rx='22' ry='12' fill='#5c3a22'/><ellipse cx='150' cy='118' rx='22' ry='12' fill='#8a6a44'/><path d='M52 108 q-6 -10 4 -12 M88 108 q6 -10 -4 -12' stroke='#3a2a1a' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi-slide silinganisa indzaba khona bafundzi bangacabangi kutsi umngcele bewunodlame kuphela. Buhlobo bangempela - kuhweba, kusebenta, umshado, kufundza tilimi - kwewela umngcele. Loku 'kubambisana' kuyincenye yesihloko seCAPS futsi kulula kukungananaki. Buta bafundzi tibonelo tanamuhla temacembu lancintisanako abuye abambisane.

slides.title: Kungani kungcubutana kwakhula?
slides.lead: Tintfo letifanako bantfu lababelana ngato - umhlaba, emanti netinkhomo - naletabangela tingcubutane tabo.

blocks.text: Njengoba kwefika ema-trekboer lamanyenti bese kubuye kwefika nebahlali bemaNgisi (British), bafuna **umhlaba** lomunyenti kanye **nemadlelo** lamanyenti. Loku kwacindzetela imiphakatsi yemaXhosa lebeyivele isebentisa lowo mhlaba. Kwatsi tinkhomo natilahleka, ngulelo cembu labeka lomunye licala, futsi kutseleka lokuncane kwakhula kwaba yimphi.

items: Omabili lamacembu abefuya tinkhomo, ngako kuncintisana ngemadlelo bekunjalo njalo.
Kutseleka tinkhomo (cattle raiding) ngemacembu omabili kwabangela intfukutselo nekungetsembani.
Hulumende wekoloni wachubeka etama kubeka umngcele lomile nekususa emaXhosa emhlabeni losenshonalanga wawo.

media.alt: Inkhomo emkhatsini nemicibisholo lemibili idvonsela etindzaweni letihlukene, kukhombisa kuncintisana.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><ellipse cx='110' cy='84' rx='30' ry='18' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M92 70 q-6 -10 4 -12 M128 70 q6 -10 -4 -12' stroke='#3a2a1a' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/><path d='M64 84 L20 84 M28 76 L20 84 L28 92' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/><path d='M156 84 L200 84 M192 76 L200 84 L192 92' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/></svg>

slides.notes: Dvweba imbangela nemphumela ngalokucacile: kwandza kwenani lebahlali kanye nemnotfo wetinkhomo lababelana ngawo kanye nemngcele loshintjako kwaholela ekungcubutaneni. Khombisa kutsi kutseleka tinkhomo kwakwentiwa nguto tombili - loku kubalulekile ngenca yekulingana. Chaza kutsi imizamo yahulumende yekudvweba umudvwa locinile, nekugcina emaXhosa ngakwelinye lelicele, kwenta kuthula kwaba matima.

slides.title: TiMphi teMngcele (Frontier Wars)
slides.lead: Emkhatsini wa-1779 na-1879 kwaba khona tinhlobonhlobo tetimphi emkhatsini wemakoloni nemiphakatsi yemaXhosa emngceleni waseMpumalanga Kapa (Eastern Cape).

blocks.text: Batati bemlandvo babala cishe **tiMphi teMngcele letili-9 (nine Frontier Wars)** phakatsi kweminyaka lecishe ibe likhulu. Kulesifundvo sibuka leto letentiwa ekucaleni **kwabo-1800**. Ngulinye limphi lativame kuphetsa ngekutsi emaXhosa alahlekelwe ngumhlaba lomunyenti, njengoba ikoloni yayicindzetela umngcele wayo waya ngasemphumalanga.

items: Letimphi tatibuye tibitwe ngekutsi tiCape Frontier Wars nobe tiXhosa Wars.
Beti ngesiyo yinye imphi lendze kodvwa betitinhlobonhlobo tekungcubutana letehlukene, kunekuthula emkhatsini.
Ngekuhamba kwesikhatsi lisu belicacile: umhlaba wasuka ekulawulweni ngemaXhosa waya ekolonini.

media.alt: Umngcele wekoloni lomakiwe ngemudvwa loticucwana ususa uya ngakwesekudla ngekuhamba kwesikhatsi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='10' y='30' width='60' height='100' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='70' y='30' width='40' height='100' fill='#cbb98f' opacity='0.7'/><rect x='110' y='30' width='40' height='100' fill='#cfc094' opacity='0.5'/><line x1='70' y1='24' x2='70' y2='136' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/><line x1='110' y1='24' x2='110' y2='136' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/><line x1='150' y1='24' x2='150' y2='136' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/><path d='M74 20 L146 20 M138 14 L146 20 L138 26' fill='none' stroke='#3a2a1a' stroke-width='3'/></svg>

slides.notes: Nika sitfombe lesikhulu ngaphambi kwemininingwane. Bafundzi abadzingi kubamba ngekhanda tonkhe letimphi letili-9; badzinga kucondza lisu - kungcubutana lokuphindzaphindzako, ngulinye limphi liphetsa ngekutsi umngcele ucindzetelwe uye ngasemphumalanga emaXhosa alahlekelwe ngumhlaba. [SME] Batati bemlandvo bayehlukana ngekutsi letimphi letili-9 tibalwa titeng tibekwa nini; cinisekisa inombolo netinsuku lofuna bafundzi batisebentise.

slides.title: Baciteka eZuurveld
slides.lead: Emabutfo emaNgisi (British) acindzetela tinkhulungwane temaXhosa taweluka uMfula iFish River kuze kuvuleke umhlaba wekoloni.

blocks.text: I-**Zuurveld** beyisigcamu semhlaba losenshonalanga koMfula iFish River lapho emaXhosa nemakoloni babehlala khona ndzawonye. Ngo-1811-1812, Umbusi **Sir John Cradock** wayala emabutfo emaNgisi (British) nebahlangene nawo kutsi **baxoshe emaXhosa** bawaphocelele awele umfula aye ngasemphumalanga.

items: Ikoloni beyifuna indzawo lengenabantfu lecacile emngceleni wayo waseMpumalanga.
Kuze kuvikelwe umngcele lomusha, lidolobha iGrahamstown lasungulwa ngo-1812.
Imindeni leminyenti yemaXhosa yalahlekelwa ngemakhaya nemadlelo lebeyiwasebentise iminyaka.

media.alt: Bantfu netinkhomo betisuswa tewela umfula tiya ngasemphumalanga.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M112 20 q-8 50 4 62 q10 20 -4 58' fill='none' stroke='#4a6d8c' stroke-width='8'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='150' cy='60' r='8'/><rect x='144' y='70' width='12' height='26'/><circle cx='178' cy='72' r='8'/><rect x='172' y='82' width='12' height='26'/></g><ellipse cx='196' cy='108' rx='16' ry='9' fill='#5c3a22'/><path d='M150 120 L200 120 M192 114 L200 120 L192 126' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi sibonelo lesicacile sekwephucwa umhlaba (dispossession). Chaza 'indzawo yekuvikela' (buffer zone) - ikoloni beyifuna umhlaba longenabantfu emkhatsini wayo nemaXhosa. Caphela kusungulwa kweGrahamstown (namuhla iMakhanda) njengelidolobha lelisemngceleni lemabutfo. Phatsa loku ngekunakekela: imindeni yangempela yaphocelelwa yasuka emhlabeni wayo. Buta bafundzi kutsi bacabanga kutsi emaXhosa aticwa njani ngekuxoshwa.

slides.title: Bahlali BemaNgisi bango-1820 (1820 British Settlers)
slides.lead: I-Britain yatfumela cishe bahlali laba-4,000 kutsi bahlale emngceleni njengelihawu lebantfu lekuvikela ikoloni.

blocks.text: Ngo-1820 hulumende wemaNgisi (British) wasita cishe **bahlali laba-4,000** bathutsele eMpumalanga Kapa (Eastern Cape). Baniketwa emapulazi endzaweni yemngcele, ngenca yekukhulisa ikoloni futsi ngenca **yekuvikela umngcele** kumaXhosa.

items: Bahlali labanyenti balwa: umhlaba bewumatima kuwulima nekungcubutana bekusedvute.
Labanye bayekela kulima bacala emadolobha, tinkhampani (trades) nemaphephandzaba.
Kufika kwabo kwengeta kucindzeteleka emhlabeni wemaXhosa lolisedvute nemngcele.

media.alt: Umkhumbi lonewaseyili edvute nelugu lunenqola nendlwana yasepulazini lelincane egcinini.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='104' width='240' height='56' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect y='92' width='240' height='14' fill='#a8bcae'/><g><rect x='40' y='58' width='6' height='40' fill='#5c3a22'/><path d='M46 60 L84 60 L64 96 L46 96 Z' fill='#efe6d2' stroke='#8a6a44'/><path d='M30 96 L96 96 L86 108 L40 108 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/></g><rect x='150' y='96' width='40' height='24' fill='#b7a98d'/><path d='M148 96 L170 78 L192 96 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='165' y='104' width='10' height='16' fill='#5c3a22'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza lisu lemaNgisi (British): beka bahlali emngceleni kuwucinisa nekuwuvikela. Caphela kutsi bahlali labanyenti baba nesikhatsi lesimatima base baphendvukela ekwenteni tinkhampani emadolobheni, lokwaholela ekukhuleni kweGrahamstown nemaphephandzaba emngceleni. Gcina kulingana: bahlali kanyenti bekungimindeni lehluphekile lejwayelekile, kodvwa kufika kwabo kwaengeta kucindzeteleka emhlabeni wemaXhosa.

slides.title: Makhanda nekuhlaselwa kweGrahamstown
slides.lead: Ngo-1819 libutfo lemaXhosa leliholwa ngumholi wemphi kanye nemphrofethi Makhanda lahlasela lidolobha lasemngceleni iGrahamstown.

blocks.text: EmaXhosa abehlukene emkhatsini webaholi lababili, **Ngqika** nemalume wakhe **Ndlambe**. Kwatsi lapho emaNgisi (British) aseka Ngqika, emabutfo aNdlambe amelana. Ngo-1819 liciko-mphrofethi **Makhanda** (lobitwa nangekutsi Nxele nobe Makana) laholela libutfo lelikhulu lemaXhosa ekuhlaseleni lokunesibindzi **iGrahamstown**.

items: Kuhlasela kwehluleka, emaXhosa alahlekelwa kakhulu.
Makhanda watinikela wafakwa ejele eRobben Island, lapho watfumbeka khona etama kubaleka.
Ngemvakwemphi ikoloni yatsatsa umhlaba lomunyenti, yenta indzawo 'lengathathi luhlangotsi' (neutral) emaXhosa langakhoni kuyingena.

media.alt: Umuntfu munye lomude aphakamise umkhonto ame phambi kwelidolobha lelincane lelinelibondza.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='120' width='240' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='#b7a98d'><rect x='150' y='84' width='70' height='36'/><rect x='160' y='72' width='16' height='12'/><rect x='192' y='72' width='16' height='12'/></g><circle cx='60' cy='52' r='12' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='54' y='66' width='12' height='40' fill='#2f5233'/><line x1='74' y1='30' x2='74' y2='108' stroke='#5c3a22' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M74 30 L70 44 L78 44 Z' fill='#7a7a7a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza kwehlukana kwaNgqika naNdlambe nekutsi kubandzakanyeka kwemaNgisi (British) kwakuchubekisela njani kungcubutana. Beka Makhanda njengemholi lobalulekile nemphrofethi, hhayi nje mhlaseli. Kuboshwa kwakhe nekufa kwakhe eRobben Island kwenta abe luphawu lwekucala lwekulwela. Caphela futsi lisu: ngemvakwemphi, ikoloni yatsatsa umhlaba lomunyenti. [SME] Bukhulu bebutfo laMakhanda buvamise kubekwa cishe ku-10,000; cinisekisa lelinombolo ngaphambi kwekulisho kubafundzi.

slides.title: Basiti futsi bayincenye yekungathwa
slides.lead: Bafundisi bevangeli beta kufundzisa nekuphendvula bantfu enkholweni - kodvwa umsebenti wabo wavula nendlela yekulawulwa ngemakoloni.

items: Bakha tikhungo tabo (mission stations), tikolo nemasontfo.
Babhala phansi lulwimi lwesiXhosa bafundzisa kufundza nekubhala.
Ngalesinye sikhatsi bavikela bantfu labamnyama ekuphatfweni kabuhlungu.
Bacindzetela bantfu kutsi bayekele tinkholelo netifundzo tabo.
Tikhungo tebafundisi tativame kuba tindzawo tekusukela temandla emakoloni.
Imibiko yabo nemamephu asita ikoloni kutsi icondze futsi ilawule umhlaba.

slides.notes: Bafundisi bevangeli bayisibonelo lesihle sekutsi sihloko 'sekubambisana nekungcubutana' siyinkimbinkimbi. Emacembu lanjengeLondon Missionary Society (Dr Johannes van der Kemp, ngemuva Dr John Philip) ngalesinye sikhatsi akhuluma alwela emalungelo emaKhoikhoi nemaXhosa, kodvwa umsebenti webafundisi wabuye wentsa kutimela kwebantfu labamnyama kuncipha kwenta kwandza kwemakoloni kube lula. Khutsata bafundzi kutsi babambe yomibili leminaka kunekwehlulela bafundisi njengalabahle nobe lababi nje.

slides.title: Kubulawa kweNkhosi Hintsa
slides.lead: Ngo-1835 emaNgisi (British) abulala inkhosi lenkhulu yemaXhosa, Hintsa, ngesikhatsi semphi ngemhlaba netinkhomo.

blocks.text: Ngo-1834 imphi yaphindze yagcuma lapho emabutfo emaXhosa, atfukutselele kulahlekelwa ngumhlaba, angena ekolonini. Ngesikhatsi sekulwa emaNgisi (British) atfumba **inkhosi lenkhulu Hintsa ka Phalo**. Ngo-May 1835 wa**dutjulwa wabulawa ngemabutfo emaNgisi** aseyisibotjwa, sento lesetfusa satfukutselisa emaXhosa.

items: Imphi yabangela kufa lokukhulu kwebantfu netinkhomo etinhlangotsini tombili.
Kufa kwaHintsa kwaba luphawu loluhlala njalo lwekungabi nabulungiswa kwemakoloni.
Ikoloni yaphindze yacindzetela umngcele wayo waya ngasemphumalanga ngemvakwemphi.

media.alt: Umkhonto lowephukile ubekwe etikw'ehawu, nelilanga leliphansi ngemuva, lokumaka kufa kwemholi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M0 118 L240 118 L240 160 L0 160 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='120' cy='118' r='34' fill='#e0913a' opacity='0.6'/><ellipse cx='120' cy='96' rx='26' ry='40' fill='#5c3a22'/><ellipse cx='120' cy='96' rx='10' ry='30' fill='#efe6d2'/><line x1='70' y1='70' x2='104' y2='104' stroke='#7a7a7a' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='138' y1='118' x2='172' y2='150' stroke='#7a7a7a' stroke-width='4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi sikhatsi lesibucayi - siphatse ngekuzotsa nangeliciniso. Hintsa bekuyinkhosi lenkhulu yemaXhosa; kubulawa kwakhe aseyisibotjwa kwabonwa njengekukhaphela futsi kusewumlandvo lobuhlungu. Gcizelela kutsi kungani kwakubalulekile: kwacinisa kulwela nekungetsembani kwemaXhosa. Gwema imininingwane lecolisako; liphuzu lelikhulu bulungiswa lobungekho nesitfunti saso lesidze. [SME] Timo letiphelele tekufa kwaHintsa nekulinyazwa kwemtimba wakhe tiyaphikiswa ngubatati bemlandvo; gcina indzaba yasekilasini inakekelekile ucinisekise emagama.

slides.title: Umholi lowalwela kugcina umhlaba
slides.lead: Sikhulu Maqoma saholela kulwela kwemaXhosa emashumini eminyaka safa siyisibotjwa eRobben Island.

blocks.text: Umhlaba bewungewetfu, futsi angeke siyekele kutiva kutsi watsatfwa kitsi.

**Maqoma**, indvodzana yeSikhulu Ngqika, abengomunye webaholi bemphi bemaXhosa labanelikhono kakhulu etimphini temngcele. Waphocelelwa wasuka emhlabeni wakhe endzaweni yeKat River wachitsa ingcenye lenkhulu yekuphila kwakhe alwela kwandza kwemakoloni. Ngemuva wafakwa ejele **eRobben Island**, lapho afela khona ngo-1873.

items: Wasebentisa timhlambi netihlahla temngcele ngobuhlakani kumabutfo lamakhulu.
Kuphila kwakhe kukhombisa indleko yebuntfu yekulahlekelwa ngumhlaba, ngokuphindzaphindzako.
Namuhla ukhunjulwa njengeliqhawe lekulwela.

slides.notes: Maqoma unika bafundzi umuntfu lokhumbulekako kuhlanganisa sihloko sekulwela nekwephucwa umhlaba. Caphela kutsi lesicaphuno siyinchazelo lebamba umuzwa wemaXhosa wekulahlekelwa, hhayi sicaphuno lesiciniseke ngco - sethule ngaleyo ndlela. Hlanganisa kuboshwa kwakhe eRobben Island naMakhanda ngaphambilini, kukhombisa luhla lolude lwebaholi bekulwela lababegcinwa lapho. [SME] Cinisekisa kutsi ukhululekile kusebentisa sicaphuno lesinchaziwe, nobe usivalele ngalesinye lesinemtfombo.

slides.title: Umngcele loshintjako, 1806-1836

blocks.alt: Umugca wesikhatsi wetigameko letibalulekile temngcele kusukela ku-1806 kuya ku-1836.

events.label: I-Britain itsatsa umbuso lohlala njalo weCape Colony
Makhanda uhlasela iGrahamstown; umhlaba lomunyenti utsatfwa
Inkhosi Hintsa yabulawa ngesikhatsi seMphi Yesitfupha Yemngcele
IGreat Trek yacala njengoba emaBhunu asuka ekolonini

slides.notes: Sebentisa lomugca wesikhatsi kucinisa lokufundziwe. Buta bafundzi balandzele lisu etigamekweni: ngulokunye kungcubutana kuvame kuphetsa ngekutsi umngcele ucindzetelwe uye ngasemphumalanga emaXhosa alahlekelwe ngumhlaba. Caphela iGreat Trek ekugcineni, bafundzi labangase bayifundze ngokulandzelako - yakhula ngenca yetinsayeya temngcele nelushintjo emtsetfweni wemakoloni.

slides.title: Lesikufundzile
slides.lead: Umngcele waseKapa bekuyindzawo yekubambisana kanye nekungcubutana - kuhweba nemshado, kodvwa futsi imphi nekwephucwa umhlaba.

blocks.text: Emngceleni waseMpumalanga Kapa (Eastern Cape), imiphakatsi yemaXhosa, ema-trekboer, emaKhoikhoi, bahlali bemaNgisi (British) nebafundisi bevangeli **babelana** ngemhlaba ngekuhweba nekuphila kwansuku tonkhe, kodvwa futsi **bagcubutana** ngemhlaba, tinkhomo nemandla. Imphi ngemvakwemphi yaphetsa ngekutsi emaXhosa alahlekelwe ngumhlaba, kepha umngcele wekoloni wachubeka uya ngasemphumalanga.

blocks.question: Niketa tibonelo letimbili tekubambisana emkhatsini wemacembu lehlukene emngceleni waseKapa.
Chaza tizatfu letimbili tekutsi kungani kungcubutana kwakhula emngceleni ekucaleni kwabo-1800.
Khetsa umholi munye (Makhanda, Hintsa nobe Maqoma) uchaze kutsi kungani akhunjulwa.

slides.notes: Vala ngekubuyela etincenyeni letimbili tesihloko - kubambisana nekungcubutana - khona bafundzi bangabamba tombili emcabangweni. Sebentisa leyo mibuto lemitsatfu njengemsebenti lobhaliwe nobe ingcoco; kwabiwa kwemamaki kulandzela indlela yeCAPS yemphendvulo lemifisha nekubhala sigaba. Khumbuta bafundzi kutsi lomlandvo wemngcele usita kuchaza tigameko letatako letinjenge-Great Trek nekulahlekelwa ngumhlaba webantfu labamnyama kulo lonkhe leNingizimu Afrika.
